dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By July 15, 2025, had Elexion Automotive completed its transition to fully automated inventory management across all production facilities?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. Internal operations records confirm that by July 15, 2025, Elexion Automotive had finalized its shift to a fully automated inventory management system across all of its 60 production plants.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By December 31, 2025, will Elexion Automotive integrate augmented reality (AR) headsets for technician training at its Texas assembly facility?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. A pilot program beginning in November 2025 will introduce AR headsets to improve on-the-job training for maintenance staff at the Texas plant.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: According to internal documentation 1,120 Elexion Automotive production staff members were certified in digital safety compliance by September 15, 2025.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many key environmental compliance metrics will Elexion Automotive collect from each of its production lines using IoT sensors and digital twins in Q1 2026?
